//: Single source of truth for capability tiers, consumed by both the PowerShell vet phase and src/localai/installer_vet.py. The KV/weights/overhead constants MIRROR src/localai/model_scout.py (WEIGHTS_GB_PER_B, VRAM_OVERHEAD_GB, KV_GB_PER_1K_BUCKETS, KV_DTYPE_FACTORS); test_tiers_json_constants_mirror_model_scout guards the two from drifting.
